words.def: gymnastic apparatus consisting of two parallel wooden rods supported on uprights
words.zh: n. 馬齒齦；（木、金屬等的）條；柵欄；酒吧（bar的複數形式）

words.def: any of a class of composite plastics used to make car bodies and cases for computers and other appliances
words.zh: [計] 絕對, 美國標準局

words.def: a room or establishment where alcoholic drinks are served over a counter
words.zh: n. 條, 棒, 酒吧, 柵, 障礙物
